User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the BR TRIP application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

FlightBooking.title: FlightBooking
FlightBooking.description: Represents a flight booking made by a user.

tripName.description: The name of the trip or destination.

customerName.description: Name of the customer who made the booking.

travelers.description: Number of travelers for this booking.

bookingDate.description: The date and time the booking was made.

HotelBooking.title: HotelBooking
HotelBooking.description: Represents a hotel booking made by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the hotel booking.

city.description: The city where the hotel is located.

numberOfGuests.description: The number of guests for this booking.

bookingDate.description: The date and time the booking was made.

Itinerary.title: Itinerary
Itinerary.description: Represents a personalized trip itinerary generated for a user.

destination.description: The destination city or location for the itinerary.

startDate.description: The start date of the itinerary.

endDate.description: The end date of the itinerary.

description.description: A description of the itinerary, including activities and suggested travel plans.

createdDate.description: The date and time the itinerary was created.

DestinationGuide.title: DestinationGuide
DestinationGuide.description: Represents a destination guide with information on attractions, activities, and local customs.

id.description: Unique identifier for the destination guide.

description.description: A detailed description of the destination, including its history, culture, and attractions.

popularAttractions.description: A list of popular attractions in the destination.

localCustoms.description: Information on local customs and etiquette.

bestTimeToVisit.description: The best time to visit the destination.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: A user's profile information including wallet and payments.

kycStatus.description: The status of the user's KYC verification.

kycDocumentType.description: The type of document used for KYC.

walletBalance.description: The current balance in the user's wallet.

savedCards.description: A list of saved payment methods.

structure.description: Stores user profiles. Uses path-based ownership for private user data.
Stores flight bookings made by a user. Ensures only the user can access their bookings.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore data structure is optimized for security and scalability, using path-based ownership for user data.
